description: Import the survey points from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\survey_points.txt' (Format: P,X,Y,Z,D) into TopoCal. The file contains 45 points from the Colorado foothills with non-sequential numbering. Renumber all points sequentially starting from 1001 with an increment of 1, ordered by their original point numbers ascending. Export the renumbered point list to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\renumbered_points.txt' (format: PointNumber, X, Y, Z, Description) and save the project.
